title: polanisia viscosa var. genuina
intro: Polanisia viscosa var. genuina is a plant species, also known as yellow flowered bladderwort, a type of flowering plant in the family Clethraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polanisia viscosa var. genuina include its ability to soothe and calm respiratory tract irritations, reduce inflammation, and help alleviate symptoms of asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
